domains.name: auth_and_authorization
findings: No auth or permission boundary changes were detected.
mitigations: No additional auth mitigation is required for this change.

domains.name: secrets_handling
findings: No elevated secret or write scopes were introduced.
mitigations: Keep tool permissions read-only and fail closed on implicit access.

domains.name: stored_user_data
findings: No sensitive storage or regulated data handling changes were detected.
mitigations: No additional stored-data mitigation is required.

domains.name: prompt_injection
findings: Prompt-injection controls are present in guardrails, validation, and failure cases.
mitigations: Reject or strip hostile content before it reaches control instructions.

domains.name: context_exfiltration
findings: Context assembly keeps validation and permission guardrails in place.
mitigations: Keep prompt-injection and schema validation checks enabled on all model outputs.

domains.name: jailbreak_resistance
findings: Golden failure cases cover jailbreak-style and hostile instruction attempts.
mitigations: Preserve adversarial probes alongside the golden dataset.

domains.name: unsafe_tool_invocation
findings: Tool invocation is constrained to explicit least-privilege permissions.
mitigations: Constrain the model to explicit tool IDs with least-privilege permissions.

threat_model.rollback_notes: Disable rollout traffic, revert the deploy, and preserve compatibility fallbacks.

abuse_cases.title: Tool emits a payload that violates the declared output schema.
abuse_cases.expected_control: Integration layer rejects the payload and returns a safe contract error or retry.

abuse_cases.title: Caller sends a response format or envelope that is no longer supported.
abuse_cases.expected_control: The request fails deterministically instead of silently coercing to a new shape.

abuse_cases.title: Tool or user content attempts prompt injection.
abuse_cases.expected_control: Injected content is blocked from control instructions and the response fails closed.

abuse_cases.title: Primary model returns degraded or empty output.
abuse_cases.expected_control: Retry policy or fallback path triggers before any customer-visible malformed output is returned.

security_checks.name: Least privilege tool validation
security_checks.summary: Tool invocation is constrained to explicit least-privilege permissions.

security_checks.name: Prompt injection coverage
security_checks.summary: Prompt-injection controls are present in guardrails, validation, and abuse cases.

security_checks.name: Context exfiltration controls
security_checks.summary: Context assembly and rollback documentation remain bounded.

security_checks.name: Rollback and blast-radius documentation
security_checks.summary: Blast radius and rollback notes are documented.

findings: Tool invocation is constrained to explicit least-privilege permissions.

signoff.rationale: Security controls passed and the required human security sign-off was granted.

watch_findings: Context assembly keeps validation and permission guardrails in place.
